title: CborError: enc_head returns NotImplemented for values > 255 but callers may not expect it
description: In rust/lichen-senml/src/cbor.rs enc_head(), when n > 255 the function returns CborError::NotImplemented instead of BufferTooSmall. This is semantically more correct (it's a feature limitation, not a buffer size issue), but callers wrapping CborError may not handle NotImplemented if they only expect BufferTooSmall. Verify that all callers handle both error variants appropriately.
